fleet count — referenced as 'six rental categories', not a vehicle count, since intake provides no number

brand.name: Canadian Car and Truck
brand.name_full: Canadian Car and Truck Rentals, Sales & Leasing
brand.tagline: Rentals, used vehicles, and in-house financing in Langley, BC.

hero.eyebrow: LANGLEY · FRASER VALLEY · SINCE THE LOT OPENED
hero.subhead: Six rental categories, a yard full of pre-owned vehicles, and in-house financing — all on one Fraser Highway lot in Langley.

services_section.h2: Six categories. One yard. Pick what hauls what you need.
services_section.body: Compact cars for the airport run. Vans for the band. Moving trucks for the apartment switch. Trailers for the lumber and the mower. The fleet is sized to get the job done — and parked in Langley, ready when you are.

services.name: Car, SUV & Van Rentals
services.tagline: Compact to full-size, parked and ready.
services.summary: Short-term rentals of compact cars, SUVs, and vans for personal or business use. Insurance-friendly paperwork, daily and weekly rates, and a yard you can walk through before you sign.

services.name: Moving Truck Rentals
services.tagline: Sized for the move, not for the showroom.
services.summary: Truck rentals for local and regional moves — cube vans, 16-footers, and cargo trucks. We rent by the day or by the move; pick up in Langley, drop off when you’re unloaded.
highlights: Cargo vans · 16-foot cube trucks · larger straight trucks
Local and Fraser Valley one-way available

services.name: Trailer Rentals
services.tagline: Open, enclosed, utility — hooked up and ready.
services.summary: Trailers for hauling cargo, equipment, or personal belongings. Open utility, enclosed cargo, and car haulers — hitch checked before you leave the yard.
highlights: Open utility · enclosed cargo · car haulers

services.name: Pre-Owned Vehicle Sales
services.tagline: Used cars and trucks. On-lot. No theatre.
services.summary: Used cars, trucks, vans, and SUVs — priced on the windshield, sold by the staff who park them. Browse the lot in Langley or check the inventory online.
highlights: Mixed inventory — daily drivers to work trucks
Walk the lot anytime during open hours

services.name: In-House Financing
services.tagline: Financing handled at the same desk that sells the truck.
services.summary: On-site financing for used vehicle purchases. No third-party rep, no shuttle to the bank — the paperwork happens where you sign for the keys. Application takes a single visit.
highlights: Bring two pieces of ID and a recent paystub or proof of income

services.name: Leasing
services.tagline: Listed in the business name. Ask the desk for current terms.
services.summary: Leasing is part of what the lot has historically offered. Current terms and rates aren’t published online — walk in or call the Langley desk for what’s available right now.

benefits_section.h2: Built for people who came here to get a vehicle — not to be sold one.

items.label: Walk the yard
items.body: Inventory is staged and labeled. What you see is what you can rent or drive home.

items.label: One desk
items.body: Rentals, sales, and financing all happen at the same counter, with the same staff.

items.label: Fraser Valley local
items.body: Langley address, Surrey to Abbotsford working area. We know the route you’re taking.

items.label: Ready when you are
items.body: Reserve online or walk in. Stock pulled, papers ready, hitch checked.

process_section.h2: Reserve, sign, drive. That’s the whole process.

steps.label: Reserve
steps.body: Pick a class, dates, and pickup. Online or by phone — either works.

steps.label: Show up
steps.body: Bring ID, a credit card or deposit, and your driver’s license. Twenty minutes at the desk.

steps.label: Walk-around
steps.body: Yard staff does a vehicle walk-around with you, photos and notes. No surprise scratches.

steps.label: Drive
steps.body: Keys in hand. Return when your contract says, refuel, drop off.

inventory_teaser.h2: A snapshot of what’s parked in Langley.
inventory_teaser.body: The lot moves — vehicles come and go weekly. The list below is a recent snapshot, not the live inventory.
inventory_teaser.footnote: Inventory turns weekly. Call ahead to confirm availability for any specific unit.

stats.label: Rental categories
stats.context: Cars, SUVs, vans, trucks, moving trucks, trailers

cta_section.h2: Pick the dates. We’ll have it pulled and ready.
cta_section.body: Send a reservation request and the desk will confirm availability, pricing, and pickup window. You can also call the yard directly during open hours.

about.h2: A working Fraser Valley rental yard — with a used-vehicle desk attached.
body_paragraphs: Canadian Car and Truck has been renting vehicles and selling pre-owned cars and trucks out of a single Langley address for years. The model is straightforward: a yard you can walk, a desk where the same staff handles rentals, sales, and financing, and stock that turns weekly.

Customers come from across the Fraser Valley — Langley, Surrey, Abbotsford, Vancouver — because the lot does what dealers usually split across three departments: rent today, buy next week, finance at the same counter.
There’s no concierge program. There’s no loyalty tier. There’s a yard, a desk, and a phone line that gets picked up. That’s the whole pitch.

values.label: Show the price
values.body: Daily rates, used-vehicle prices, and financing terms are quoted at the desk — not buried.

values.label: Show the vehicle
values.body: Walk the yard, look it over, ask the staff who parked it. No back lot, no held-back stock.

values.label: Show the address
values.body: 20026 Fraser Hwy, Langley. One physical lot. Phone line answered during open hours.

contact.h2: We’re on Fraser Highway in Langley. Drop in or call ahead.
contact.form_intro: For reservation requests, financing questions, or to ask about a specific vehicle on the lot.

reserve.h2: Pick the class, dates, and pickup. We’ll confirm by phone or email.
reserve.body: Submitted requests reach the Langley desk during open hours. Same-day pickups are stock-dependent — we’ll call back to confirm.
reserve.form_fields_intro: Required fields are marked with an asterisk.

legal.footer_disclaimer: Inventory and rental availability are subject to change. Pricing, terms, and financing offers are confirmed at the time of booking or signing.
